title: Storm's Cozy Heaven
description: A cozy minecraft experience with beautiful terrain, focused on farming, building and also a bit of exploration.
body:
**_Hi, i'm Storm, and i'm happy to see you checking out my modpack page!_**

This modpack is focused on a cozy experience, to enjoy your 2-week Minecraft phase! Storm's Cozy Heaven is focused on  farming, building and a bit of exploring too! It has mods like Farmers Delight, Create, Regions Unexplored and OTBWG, and a bunch of [Let's do!] mods. We also have decoration mods, so you can make a truly unique and beautiful house! I also suggest you check out some of the recourse packs, because some of them are pretty cool too! And of course, i've added some shader packs, so it's as immersive as possible!

I hope you enjoy the modpack!
